description_long: This is a medium-sized, metallic submarine with a streamlined, rounded hull and a conning tower located centrally along the deck. The exterior is primarily gray metal, with a wooden deck section running along the top. The bow is sharply pointed, and the stern features a propeller and rudder assembly. The conning tower is equipped with railings and what appears to be a periscope or antenna. The overall design suggests a military or historical submarine, likely from the mid-20th century, with visible hatches and deck fittings.
description: A gray metallic submarine with a rounded hull, central conning tower, and wooden deck details. Features include a pointed bow, stern propeller, and deck railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, narrow profile, and deck railings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rounded hull, central conning tower, and deck details.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stern, propeller, rudder, and the wooden deck section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the hull and conning tower.
